prompts.text: Warm colours — red, orange, yellow — feel bright and energetic. Cool colours — blue, green, purple — feel calm and peaceful. Introduce these families before starting; use them as colours are chosen.
Affirm all colour choices without directing: 'You chose [colour] — what made you pick that?' Avoid 'good' or 'right'. Colouring is creative; every choice is valid.
Core question to return to: 'What colour is that in real life? Does it matter if we use a different colour?' — opens up creative vs. realistic thinking.
Use the image as a vocabulary springboard: 'What animal is this? What can you tell me about it?' — extends beyond colour into world knowledge.
